title: Man desecrates Brooklyn Heights mosque with feces
summary:

title: New York announces $5.1M to fight invasive species
summary:
In Brooklyn, Green-Wood Cemetery will receive $25,940 to combat beech leaf disease through a root zone inoculation program.
